figures.caption: Figure 1: Illustration of the scalar quantizer mapping with B = 4. The function F (t) (blue) and its scaled underlying density f(t) (green) are shown. A uniform grid shifted by U defines boundaries hj on the y-axis, which project back to the boundaries of the quantization buckets Bj . The reconstruction values qj are defined as the inverse image of the bucket midpoints mj = (hj + hj+1)/2.
